criteria.description: Does the code appear to do what the project claims, with sound logic and handling of edge cases
Robustness across failures: error handling, retries where warranted, absence of silent failure paths
Secrets kept out of source, input validation at boundaries, no obviously dangerous patterns
Logging, error reporting, and the ability to tell what the system did after the fact
Clarity of structure: sensible module boundaries, separation of concerns, minimal accidental complexity
Ease of setup and contribution: dependency management, scripts, tests, CI
README and documentation quality: what it is, how to run it, configuration, limitations
